name: Destroy Undead (CR 3 or below)

compilation_state.summary: Feature successfully generated from reference data.

description: Starting at 5th level, when an undead fails its saving throw against your Turn Undead feature, the creature is instantly destroyed if its challenge rating is at or below a certain threshold. At 14th level, any undead of CR 3 or lower that fails its save against Turn Undead is destroyed.
lore: The radiance of your faith becomes a searing tide, capable of unmaking the most stubborn of the restless dead.
